index-light.notes: hardcoded saturated canvas circles (green/tan) ignore Almanac

index-dark.notes: hardcoded saturated canvas circles (blue/purple) ignore Almanac

activity-light.notes: accent overuse: COMMIT badges, SUNDAY header, timeline dots all rust

clock-dark.notes: second hand has no visible accent in dark — rust hardcoded, --theme-accent (amber) not applied

error-light.notes: 404 page itself is Almanac-correct; dev error overlay leaked into screenshot (rig selector didn't match)

focus-light.notes: keyboard-shortcut key chips have rounded corners; two tiny saturated icons mid-page

focus-dark.notes: 25:00 timer text near-illegible (subtle ink token instead of body ink); ring nearly invisible

guestbook-dark.notes: input borders very subtle in dark

lab-light.notes: saturated green LIVE badges + red-dot emoji-style decoration + rounded cards — off-theme

morse-light.notes: reference letter cards have rounded corners (radius ~6-8px); text input rounded

playground-light.notes: filled rust generate button is loud (defensible as moment-of-attention); textarea+selects+image-frame rounded

playground-dark.notes: filled amber button stands out strongly in dark; controls rounded

projects-light.notes: project cards rounded; saturated language-color bar is data (acceptable)

projects-dark.notes: cards near-invisible in dark; title text low contrast

stats-light.notes: REPOS/STARS/DAYSTREAK/COMMITS cards rounded; language bar saturated (data, ok)

terminal-light.notes: macOS-style terminal window chrome (stoplight buttons + chrome bar + rounded window) violates no-chrome rule under Almanac

terminal-dark.notes: stoplight buttons still saturated red/yellow/green in dark; window chrome persists
